embed.title: !incident
embed.description:
Alerts for pokestop incidents — Team Rocket invasions, Kecleon appearances, Pokemon Showcase events, and gold (special) pokestops.

`{{prefix}}incident` is preferred over `{{prefix}}invasion` because the underlying webhook covers every incident type, not just Team Rocket grunts. `{{prefix}}invasion` is still supported as an alias.

fields.name: Team Rocket invasions (by grunt type)
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}incident dragon` — dragon-type grunt
`{{prefix}}incident fire ice electric` — any of these types
`{{prefix}}incident mixed` — the mixed-type grunt
`{{prefix}}incident everything` — every grunt type

Grunt types match pokemon types: normal, fire, water, grass, electric, ice, fighting, poison, ground, flying, psychic, bug, rock, ghost, dragon, dark, steel, fairy, plus special ones like `mixed`, `dark_water_fire`, etc.

fields.name: Team Rocket leaders and Giovanni
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}incident arlo`
`{{prefix}}incident cliff`
`{{prefix}}incident sierra`
`{{prefix}}incident giovanni`
`{{prefix}}incident leader` — all three leaders (not Giovanni)

fields.name: Other incident types
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}incident kecleon` — Kecleon appearance
`{{prefix}}incident showcase` — Pokemon Showcase event
`{{prefix}}incident gold` — gold/special pokestops
`{{prefix}}incident balloon` — rocket balloon incidents

fields.name: Gender filter
fields.value: `gender:male` / `gender:female` — only alert when the grunt is a specific gender (useful for costume hunting)

fields.name: Message flags
fields.value:
`clean` — auto-delete after the incident expires
`edit` — single message edited in place
`ping`

fields.name: Remove
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}incident remove dragon`
`{{prefix}}incident remove everything`
`{{prefix}}incident remove kecleon`
`{{prefix}}untrack id:<N>`
